summary: M7-TASK-GRAPH-001 task state is CLOSED after PR #159 passed CI and entered origin/main at bde9037d83b20f0fe6ea19e5d67b926d6ca161f7. This closure checkpoint records that the accepted planning-only M7 Beta task DAG is now authoritative on main. The next dependency-ready M7 task is M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001.

tests_run.result: PR #159 is MERGED into main with merge commit bde9037d83b20f0fe6ea19e5d67b926d6ca161f7.
M7-TASK-GRAPH-001 listed as CLOSED; M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001 listed as READY; remaining downstream M7 tasks remain DRAFT.
M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001 is the only READY task.
No whitespace errors after closure update.

decisions: Close M7-TASK-GRAPH-001 only after the accepted task graph entered origin/main through PR #159.
Keep M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001 as the first downstream READY M7 task.
Preserve M6_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS; do not rewrite it as unconditional PASS or release readiness.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; no manual node battle implementation task or M7/M8 blocking spike, research, validation, or exit-gate dependency is authorized.

Preserve Human Gates for major cultural risk, formal content lock acceptance, manual playthrough acceptance where human judgment is required, release/commercial/branding, telemetry, server/multiplayer, cloud-save implementation/accounts/secrets, arbitrary-code mods, irreversible migration, and frozen product/platform/core changes.
risks: This closure records only the task graph. Downstream M7 content-lock, culture review, content fill, balance, performance, platform, save-boundary, playthrough, and exit evidence must be independently executed and reviewed.
requested_action: Merge the closure checkpoint, sync main, then start M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001 with the required gameplay_designer writer and systems_architect reviewer.
